pageContext.name: Pennywise Zippermouth
pageContext.description: We All Zip Down Here   Originally featured as the fearsome clown in Stephen King's classic It , Pennywise is ready to greet the kids of Derry, Maine. While he looks like a cute and cuddly clown, let's not forget he's actually an ancient shape-shifting creature.   The 10' tall Pennywise Zippermouth™ is in his dancing clown form, including his grey clown suit with ruffles, pompoms and spine detailing. Unzip his iconic smile to unveil FOUR ROWS of terrifying zipper teeth.   Like all of our Zippermouths™, Pennywise is a sculptural plush. He's stitched with great precision using top-quality materials and designed to hold his shape no matter how many times he shape-shifts into another form.
